description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Sanitize that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs, sanitize_clang and sanitize_gcc, both running on ubuntu-22.04. Each job should check out the repository, install dependencies, configure a build project with specific CMake flags, build the project, install it, and run tests with ctest, including performance tests with xvfb-run.
